faqs.question: What courses are offered?
faqs.answer: The college offers B.Tech courses in Computer Science, IT, ECE, Mechanical, and Civil Engineering.

faqs.question: Available courses
faqs.answer: The college offers B.Tech courses in Computer Science, IT, ECE, Mechanical, and Civil Engineering.

faqs.question: What is course duration?
faqs.answer: All B.Tech courses have a duration of 4 years.

faqs.question: Duration of courses
faqs.answer: All B.Tech courses have a duration of 4 years.

faqs.question: What is admission process?
faqs.answer: Admissions are based on 12th marks and entrance exam scores.

faqs.question: How to get admission?
faqs.answer: Admissions are based on 12th marks and entrance exam scores.

faqs.question: What is the fee?
faqs.answer: The annual tuition fee is ₹1,00,000 for all courses.

faqs.question: Fee structure
faqs.answer: The annual tuition fee is ₹1,00,000 for all courses.

faqs.question: How much fees?
faqs.answer: The annual tuition fee is ₹1,00,000 for all courses.

faqs.question: Any extra fees?
faqs.answer: Yes, additional charges may include exam fees, hostel fees, and transport fees.

faqs.question: Scholarships available?
faqs.answer: Yes, scholarships are provided based on merit and government schemes.

faqs.question: College timings?
faqs.answer: The college works from 9:00 AM to 4:00 PM, Monday to Friday.

faqs.question: Payment methods?
faqs.answer: Payments can be made via UPI, net banking, debit/credit cards, and bank transfer.

faqs.question: Dress code?
faqs.answer: Yes, students must wear formal attire or college uniform.

faqs.question: Hostel available?
faqs.answer: Yes, separate hostels are available for boys and girls.

faqs.question: Transport facility?
faqs.answer: Yes, buses are available covering major routes in the city.

faqs.question: Campus facilities?
faqs.answer: Facilities include library, labs, sports complex, Wi-Fi, and cafeteria.

faqs.question: Placement cell?
faqs.answer: Yes, the college has a dedicated placement cell.

faqs.question: Average package?
faqs.answer: The average package is around ₹4-6 LPA.

faqs.question: Attendance required?
faqs.answer: Yes, students must maintain at least 75% attendance.

faqs.question: WiFi available?
faqs.answer: Yes, Wi-Fi is available for students across the campus.

faqs.question: Library available?
faqs.answer: Yes, a well-equipped library with books and digital resources is available.

faqs.question: Contact details?
faqs.answer: You can contact via email info@abcinstitute.edu or call +91-9876543210.
